'''thayoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osculance|osculance]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osculance|osculance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thayoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyereth|thæyereth]] || [[word:thæyerej|thæyerej]] || [[word:thæyeresh|thæyeresh]] || [[word:thæyere|thæyere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayoyoroth|thayoyoroth]] || [[word:thayoyoroj|thayoyoroj]] || [[word:thayoyorosh|thayoyorosh]] || [[word:thayoyoro|thayoyoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayoroth|thayoroth]] || [[word:thayoroj|thayoroj]] || [[word:thayorosh|thayorosh]] || [[word:thayoro|thayoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayofroth|thayofroth]] || [[word:thayofroj|thayofroj]] || [[word:thayofrosh|thayofrosh]] || [[word:thayofrof|thayofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayorotho|thayorotho]] || [[word:thayorojo|thayorojo]] || [[word:thayorosho|thayorosho]] || [[word:thayoroko|thayoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayoroth|thayoroth]] || [[word:thayoroj|thayoroj]] || [[word:thayorosh|thayorosh]] || [[word:thayoro|thayoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayorothol|thayorothol]] || [[word:thayorojol|thayorojol]] || [[word:thayoroshol|thayoroshol]] || [[word:thayorokol|thayorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayorothotho|thayorothotho]] || [[word:thayorojojo|thayorojojo]] || [[word:thayoroshosho|thayoroshosho]] || [[word:thayoroko|thayoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayorothon|thayorothon]] || [[word:thayorojon|thayorojon]] || [[word:thayoroshon|thayoroshon]] || [[word:thayorokon|thayorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayorothoro|thayorothoro]] || [[word:thayorojoro|thayorojoro]] || [[word:thayoroshoro|thayoroshoro]] || [[word:thayorokoro|thayorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
